basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Kalyani Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 34 Professor, Assistant Professor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani) Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website aiimskalyani.edu.in. A total of 34 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Kalyani Faculty Recruitment 2026.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Kalyani Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Kalyani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Kalyani Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Kalyani Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Kalyani Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Kalyani to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Kalyani Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Faculty Posts at AIIMS Kalyani is 26th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Faculty Posts at AIIMS Kalyani?
faq.answer: There are a total of 34 vacancies announced for various Faculty Posts at AIIMS Kalyani in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for AIIMS Kalyani Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply for the AIIMS Kalyani Faculty Posts through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q4. What is the official website of AIIMS Kalyani?
faq.answer: The official website of All India Institute of Medical Sciences Kalyani is www.aiimskalyani.edu.in.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The Assistant Professor post at AIIMS Kalyani offers a salary in Level-12, ranging from 101500 to 167400.

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this AIIMS Kalyani Faculty recruitment is ADMIN/RECT/FAC/1/2024-ADMIN/626.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No specific application fee has been mentioned in the provided details for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: The Faculty Posts at AIIMS Kalyani are being recruited through Direct Recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Which state is AIIMS Kalyani located in?
faq.answer: AIIMS Kalyani is located in the state of West Bengal, specifically in the city of Kalyani.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary for the Professor post?
faq.answer: The Professor post at AIIMS Kalyani offers a salary in Level-14A, with a pay scale of 168900-220400.
